title: Graph core
items: Graph(name, opts?) constructor
graph.add(name, node) / graph.remove(name)
graph.get(name) / graph.set(name, value) / graph.node(name)
graph.connect(from_name, to_name) / graph.disconnect(from_name, to_name)

title: Composition
items: graph.mount(name, child_graph) — subgraph embedding
Colon-delimited namespace: 'parent:child:node'
graph.resolve(path) — node lookup by qualified path
Lifecycle signal propagation through mount hierarchy

title: Introspection
items: graph.describe() → JSON dict (nodes, edges, subgraphs, meta)
graph.observe(name?) → live message stream (GraphObserveSource)
Type inference in describe output (describe_node / _infer_describe_type)
reachable(described, from_path, direction, *, max_depth=None) — standalone BFS utility

title: Lifecycle & persistence
items: graph.signal(messages) — broadcast to all nodes
graph.destroy() — TEARDOWN all
graph.snapshot() / graph.restore(data) / Graph.from_snapshot(data)
graph.to_json() — deterministic serialization

title: Seamless persistence
items: graph.auto_checkpoint(adapter, opts?) — debounced reactive persistence; trigger gate uses message_tier (>=2)
Incremental snapshots — diff-based persistence via Graph.diff(), periodic full snapshot compaction
Selective checkpoint filter
Graph.register_factory(pattern, factory)
Graph.unregister_factory(pattern)
Graph.from_snapshot(data) registry integration — auto-reconstruct dynamic graphs; topological dep resolution
restore(data, only=...) — selective restore (partial hydration by node name pattern)
Guard reconstruction from data — policy_from_rules() pattern

title: Actor & Guard (access control)
items: Actor type: TypedDict with type, id, and extensible claims
Actor context parameter on down(), set(), signal()
guard node option: (actor, action) -> bool; raises GuardDenied
policy() declarative builder — CASL-style ergonomics
Scoped describe(actor=) / observe(name=, actor=) — filters output
Attribution: each mutation records { actor, timestamp } via node.last_mutation
meta.access derived from guard when present
GuardDenied exception with actor, node, action

title: Graph tests
items: Graph add/remove/connect/disconnect
Mount and namespace resolution
describe() output validation
observe() message stream tests
Snapshot round-trip tests
Guard enforcement: allowed/denied writes, signals, observe filtering
Policy builder: allow/deny precedence, wildcard, composed policies
Actor attribution: Graph.set + qualified mount paths; direct down
Scoped describe: filtered output matches guard permissions
GuardDenied exception: correct actor/node/action in diagnostics
